titleStmt.title: SII 39.60: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 60. (A.R. No. 60 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. MADURAI SULTAN (RĀJĀKKAL TAMBIRĀṈ)-[Hijra] 761 (1359 A.D.)

summary.p: This is incomplete. Refers to the destruction of the village Sūraikkuḍi by some military captain (of the king ?). The temple trustees seem to have given some tax concession to the Ūravar of Kōṭṭiyūr and Viraiyachchilai respectively in Poṉṉamarāvati nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī
Irācarāca Irācātirāca cakalanicavakula koṉ
kālam Irācatampirāṉāṟku 7 100 6 10 1 varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 5§ peṉṉamarā
vati nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom viraiyāccilai Uḷiṭ
ṭa Ūravaṟku koṭṭiyūr Uḷiṭṭa Ūravaṟkum
piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Irācākkaḷ tam
pirāṉār cūraikkuṭi Aḻiyac ceyvatāka mañcilicu Elicu
cāṉe Ācam tāttāṉe muvācam tāṉucāṉe Irācāttikā
ṉuṭaṉe parikāram Ēvappaṭṭu cūraikkuṭiyum Aḻiyacce
ytu māttūr kuḷattile viṭutiyā viraiyaccilai
�ṭṭiyūr Ūravarkaḷai kāṇaccolli Aruḷicceyita
paṭiyāle Ivvaṭikaḷ kaṇ Aruvukku Irācarācaṉ tampirā
ṉar koṉtukāṉukkum Eṅkaḷukkum piramāṇam
varakkāṭṭi Aruḷiṉapaṭi muṉṉāḷ nammuṭaiyapaṇ namakku Iṟuttu
ponta viraiyāccilai Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrum koṭṭiyūr Uḷḷiṭṭa
Ūrum taṅkaḷ nāṭṭuṭaṉe kūṭṭi taṅkaḷ maryāti kaṭamai I
ṟukka kaṭavārkaḷ Eṉṟum Oṉṟupaṭa naṭatti potakaṭavārkaḷ
ḷeṉṟum Iccetikku tirukoḷakkuṭi nāyaṉār ko
yilil tirumalaiyile kalveṭṭikkuṭuppateṉṟu piramāṇa
m vantapaṭiyāle nāṅkaḷum nāṭṭuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Eṅkaḷ
mariyātikaṭamai Iṟuppatāka cantirātittavarai celvatā
ka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nāṭṭa
varom viraiyāccilaiyuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrāvaṟkkum koṭṭiyūr
Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravaṟkkum Ippaṭikku poṉṉamarāpati ṭṭu nā
Digital edition of SII 39.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
